UserProgress.title: User Progressive Quiz State
UserProgress.description: Represents the saved state of a clinical quiz for a user

currentQuestion.description: Index of the current active question (0-indexed)

timeRemaining.description: Number of seconds remaining in the quiz

selectedAnswers.description: Map from question index (string) to selected answer option character

userId.description: The Firebase Auth UID of the user who owns this progress

quizType.description: Discriminator of the quiz type (e.g. jvp_and_murmurs)

updatedAt.description: ISO timestamp of the latest update

users_progress/{userId}.description: The online quiz progress for a specific user
